title: La revanche de Roger la Honte
writer: André Cayatte, Jules Mary, Charles Spaak
actors: Lucien Coëdel, María Casares, Paul Bernard
plot: Roger Laroque is now a rich man. He returns to France under the name of William Farnell. There, he discovers that on the one hand his wife has died of a broken heart and on the other that his daughter Suzanne is in love with Raymo...
